description: Build or refresh the master project blueprint, module map, routes, APIs, flows, and change map so future work can rely on durable project memory.
request: Refresh full system atlas and fill blueprint/module/routes/api/change map docs.

phases.title: Inventory Scope
phases.goal: Scan the requested project scope and identify the major modules, entrypoints, routes, APIs, and ownership boundaries.
required: Inspect only the directories and files needed to map the requested scope accurately.
Capture major modules, routes, service layers, data flows, and integration boundaries.
Collect evidence for stale docs, missing map sections, or structural ambiguity.

phases.title: Refresh Atlas Docs
phases.goal: Update every core atlas document so the project map is current and reusable.
required: Update the project blueprint, module map, routes and entrypoints, API surface, and change map docs.
Document critical flows, ownership boundaries, and known implementation constraints.
Preserve useful historical context instead of overwriting it blindly.

phases.title: Validate Atlas Coverage
phases.goal: Recheck the refreshed atlas against the codebase and record remaining blind spots.
required: Reopen the highest-risk files referenced by the atlas and confirm the docs match reality.
Record assumptions, unknowns, and the next recommended atlas refresh targets.
Summarize what changed and how the atlas was verified.
